channel.title: GitHub Vue Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: CorentinTh/it-tools
item.description: Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: dullage/flatnotes
item.description: A self-hosted, database-less note taking web app that utilises a flat folder of markdown files for storage.

item.title: imsyy/SPlayer
item.description: 🎉 一个简约的音乐播放器，支持逐字歌词，下载歌曲，展示评论区，音乐云盘及歌单管理，音乐频谱，移动端基础适配 | 网易云音乐 | A minimalist music player

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: A UI Library for Modern Web Apps, powered by Vue & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
item.description: A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

item.title: doocs/md
item.description: ✍ WeChat Markdown Editor | 一款高度简洁的微信 Markdown 编辑器：支持 Markdown 语法、色盘取色、多图上传、一键下载文档、自定义 CSS 样式、一键重置等特性

item.title: ccbikai/Sink
item.description: ⚡ A Simple / Speedy / Secure Link Shortener with Analytics, 100% run on Cloudflare.

item.title: ccfddl/ccf-deadlines
item.description: ⏰ Collaboratively track deadlines of conferences recommended by CCF (Website, Python Cli, Wechat Applet) / If you find it useful, please star this project, thanks~

item.title: iAJue/MoeKoeMusic
item.description: 一款开源简洁高颜值的酷狗第三方客户端 An open-source, concise, and aesthetically pleasing third-party client for KuGou that supports Windows / macOS / Linux
